mapper.sql: FROM ELIB_COMMENT WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx} ORDER BY regdt DESC
mapper.select: SELECT a.comment_idx, TO_CHAR(a.regdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regdt, a.book_idx, a.member_id, a.user_comment, b.book_name, b.author_name, b.book_pubname, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = b.cate_id) AS cate_name, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = b.parent_id) AS parent_name FROM ELIB_COMMENT a, ELIB_BOOK b WHERE 1=1 AND a.book_idx = b.book_idx AND a.comment_idx = #{comment_idx}

${pagingTop} SELECT a.comment_idx, TO_CHAR(a.regdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regdt, a.book_idx, a.member_id, a.user_comment, b.book_name, b.author_name, b.book_pubname, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = b.cate_id) AS cate_name, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = b.parent_id) AS parent_name, ( SELECT TO_CHAR(z.lend_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM ELIB_LEND z WHERE z.lend_idx = ( SELECT MAX(lend_idx) FROM ELIB_LEND z WHERE z.member_id = a.member_id AND z.book_idx = a.book_idx ) ) AS last_lend_dt, ( SELECT TO_CHAR(z.return_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM ELIB_LEND z WHERE z.lend_idx = ( SELECT MAX(lend_idx) FROM ELIB_LEND z WHERE z.member_id = a.member_id AND z.book_idx = a.book_idx ) ) AS last_return_dt, c.user_idx, c.sex, c.birth_day, (SELECT MAX(q.homepage_name) from CMS_HOMEPAGE q WHERE q.homepage_code = c.library_code) AS member_library_name, CASE WHEN c.birth_day IS NULL OR c.birth_day = '' THEN '불명' WHEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE), TO_DATE(c.birth_day, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 13 THEN '어린이' WHEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE), TO_DATE(c.birth_day, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 19 THEN '청소년' WHEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE), TO_DATE(c.birth_day, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 20 THEN '성인' ELSE '불명' END AS age_group
ORDER BY a.regdt DESC ${pagingBottom}

SELECT a.comment_idx, TO_CHAR(a.regdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regdt, a.book_idx, a.member_id, a.user_comment, b.book_name, b.author_name, b.book_pubname, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = b.cate_id) AS cate_name, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = b.parent_id) AS parent_name, ( SELECT TO_CHAR(z.lend_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM ELIB_LEND z WHERE z.lend_idx = ( SELECT MAX(lend_idx) FROM ELIB_LEND z WHERE z.member_id = a.member_id AND z.book_idx = a.book_idx ) ) AS last_lend_dt, ( SELECT TO_CHAR(z.return_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM ELIB_LEND z WHERE z.lend_idx = ( SELECT MAX(lend_idx) FROM ELIB_LEND z WHERE z.member_id = a.member_id AND z.book_idx = a.book_idx ) ) AS last_return_dt, c.user_idx, c.sex, c.birth_day, (SELECT MAX(q.homepage_name) from CMS_HOMEPAGE q WHERE q.homepage_code = c.library_code) AS member_library_name, CASE WHEN c.birth_day IS NULL OR c.birth_day = '' THEN '불명' WHEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE), TO_DATE(c.birth_day, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 13 THEN '어린이' WHEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE), TO_DATE(c.birth_day, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 19 THEN '청소년' WHEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE), TO_DATE(c.birth_day, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 20 THEN '성인' ELSE '불명' END AS age_group
ORDER BY a.regdt DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ELIB_COMMENT WHERE comment_idx = #{comment_idx} AND member_id = #{member_id}
